arts.ttl: Arsenal's midfield was 'all over the place' in first-half against PSG, Wayne Rooney claims - as Gunners struggled to adapt without suspended Thomas Partey
arts.sum: The Gunners were playing their biggest game in a number of years on Tuesday night, hosting the French champions in the first leg of their Champions League semi-final clash.

arts.ttl: Arsenal fans accused of 'disrespecting' the Pope after appearing to disrupt the minute's silence following his death ahead of PSG clash
arts.sum: Arsenal fans have been accused of showing a lack of respect to the Pope after appearing to interrupt the minute's silence before their Champions League semi-final clash with PSG.

arts.ttl: Wayne Rooney suggests Declan Rice's pre-match demand showed Arsenal didn't understand PSG
arts.sum: Declan Rice unleashed a rallying cry to his Arsenal team-mates before their clash with Paris Saint-Germain, but Wayne Rooney felt it made the Gunners look a little naive

arts.ttl: Revealed: Declan Rice's defiant eight-word rallying cry to Arsenal team-mates in pre-match huddle ahead of PSG showdown
arts.sum: The Gunners went into what was one of the biggest games in their recent history on the back of a stunning victory over holders Real Madrid, after winning 5-1 on aggregate against the Spaniards.

arts.ttl: Champions League LIVE: Arsenal host PSG in semifinal
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain visit north London to take on Arsenal in the first leg of their Champions League semfinal. Join ESPN for live action.

arts.ttl: Arsene Wenger sits alongside Prime Minister Keir Starmer as he makes rare return to the Emirates to watch Arsenal's Champions League semi-final showdown with PSG
arts.sum: Arsenal's legendary former manager Arsene Wenger had made a rare appearance to the Emirates to support his old club ahead of their crunch Champions League semi-final first leg against PSG.

arts.ttl: Champions League line-ups: Arsenal vs. PSG – Donnarumma starts in European semi
arts.sum: Gianluigi Donnarumma starts in goal for Paris Saint-Germain in their Champions League semi-final first leg...

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta tells Arsenal fans ‘I need you’ in passionate message ahead of PSG clash
arts.sum: Arteta had called on Arsenal fans to bring everything - including their shirt and boots

arts.ttl: Alan Shearer issues prediction for Arsenal vs PSG with 'best in the world' warning
arts.sum: Arsenal face their biggest game of the season on Tuesday evening as they welcome French giants Paris Saint-Germain to the Emirates Stadium for their Champions League semi-final clash

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta identified one PSG star with 'aura and energy' he'd never seen before
arts.sum: Arsenal boss Mikel Arteta has opened up on his time with Paris Saint-Germain and said that he has never seen a player with the demeanour of Brazilian icon Ronaldinho
